docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT APPEARED THROUGH MEGAN VANZYKL--EX-WIFE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY GRECO, MARCUS AS TO DEFENDANT VANZYL, ADRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRECO, MARCUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANZYL, ADRIAN $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VANZYL, ADRIAN
